title: Mas Effects
description:
A mod focused on enhancing Minecraft PVP visually!
Mace shockwave, Custom totem particles and more!
body:
### Mas Effects is a fabric mod that enhances PvP visually (Mainly focused on Mace PvP)

Trailer (Mas Effects 2.0):
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JJvpNGda5yk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Trailer (Mas Effects 1.0):

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PcFgdQVnKdI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


The mod has the following features:
- Mace Smash Shockwave

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a018aa6d52a7dfca8ba8488df9d335066c96473b_0.webp)

- Custom Totem Effect

![Custom Totem Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c85e57d2488e64d03db90993bae765a2fc7dcfd_0.webp)

- Change Hitbox Opacity and Colors
- Ender Pearl trail effect

![Ender Pearl trail effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca553b4e75dbaf3f21ac80f678d1ae31fa9f8382_0.webp)
 
- Player Death Effect

![Player Death Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eddc03ea71e33af195fc7b8a42b2211980d2667_0.webp)

What the mod's configuration allows you to change:
- Mace shockwave opacity and size
- Totem effect opacity
- Hitbox opacity and colors
- Ender Pearl trail opacity


_Additionaly, Red Effects adds some other effects that didn't make it to the main mod, you can check it here!_

[Red Effetcs Mod (Sequel)](https://modrinth.com/mod/red-effects)
